projects.name: Read X
projects.description: 🏆 **Hackathon Project** — An AI-powered OCR platform that extracts, digitizes, and translates handwritten and printed text from manuscripts, archives, and documents across 20+ Indian languages using Google Gemini AI.

projects.name: Doodl
projects.description: A real-time multiplayer drawing and guessing game where one player draws and others guess what they're drawing. Built with NextJs, TailwindCSS, and Socket.io.

projects.name: NextJs Blog App
projects.description: A blog app built with NextJs, TailwindCSS, and PostgreSQL. It features user authentication, a rich text editor, and a comment system.

projects.name: Pixivo - a image sharing platform
projects.description: A platform for sharing and discovering artwork, built with NextJs, TailwindCSS, and PostgreSQL.

projects.name: Smart Library Management System
projects.description: A web application for managing library resources, built with Php, TailwindCSS, and MySQL.

projects.name: Old Portfolio Website
projects.description: A web application for showcasing my projects and skills, built with Php, TailwindCSS, and MySQL.
